scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace @milantra/api & npm run dev --workspace @milantra/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @milantra/api && npm run build --workspace @milantra/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @milantra/api && npm run test --workspace @milantra/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @milantra/api && npm run lint --workspace @milantra/web
